2603.28342.title: Kernel-Smith: A Unified Recipe for Evolutionary Kernel Optimization
2603.28342.paper_summary: We present Kernel-Smith, a framework for high-performance GPU kernel and operator generation that combines a stable evaluation-driven evolutionary agent with an evolution-oriented post-training recipe. On the agent side, Kernel-Smith maintains a population of executable candidates and iteratively improves them using an archive of top-performing and diverse programs together with structured execution feedback on compilation, correctness, and speedup. To make this search reliable, we build backend-specific evaluation services for Triton on NVIDIA GPUs and Maca on MetaX GPUs. On the training side, we convert long-horizon evolution trajectories into step-centric supervision and reinforcement learning signals by retaining correctness-preserving, high-gain revisions, so that the model is optimized as a strong local improver inside the evolutionary loop rather than as a one-shot generator. Under a unified evolutionary protocol, Kernel-Smith-235B-RL achieves state-of-the-art overall performance on KernelBench with Nvidia Triton backend, attaining the best average speedup ratio and outperforming frontier proprietary models including Gemini-3.0-pro and Claude-4.6-opus. We further validate the framework on the MetaX MACA backend, where our Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B surpasses large-scale counterparts such as DeepSeek-V3.2-think and Qwen3-235B-2507-think, highlighting potential for seamless adaptation across heterogeneous platforms. Beyond benchmark results, the same workflow produces upstream contributions to production systems including SGLang and LMDeploy, demonstrating that LLM-driven kernel optimization can transfer from controlled evaluation to practical deployment.
2603.28342.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 Kernel-Smith，一個高效能 GPU 核心和運算子生成的框架，結合了穩定的評估驅動進化代理和以進化為導向的後訓練配方。在代理端，Kernel-Smith 維持一個可執行候選者的族群，並利用一個包含表現最佳和多樣化程式的檔案，以及針對編譯、正確性和加速的結構化執行反饋，逐步改善這些候選者。為了使這個搜尋過程可靠，我們為 NVIDIA GPU 上的 Triton 和 MetaX GPU 上的 Maca 建立了後端特定的評估服務。在訓練方面，我們將長期進化軌跡轉換為以步驟為中心的監督和強化學習信號，通過保留正確性保持的高增益修訂，使模型在進化循環中作為強大的局部改進者進行優化，而不是作為一次性生成器。在統一的進化協議下，Kernel-Smith-235B-RL 在使用 Nvidia Triton 後端的 KernelBench 上達到了最先進的整體性能，獲得了最佳的平均加速比，並超越了包括 Gemini-3.0-pro 和 Claude-4.6-opus 在內的前沿專有模型。我們進一步在 MetaX MACA 後端驗證了該框架，我們的 Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B 超越了大型對應模型，如 DeepSeek-V3.2-think 和 Qwen3-235B-2507-think，突顯了在異質平台上無縫適應的潛力。除了基準結果，相同的工作流程還對生產系統（包括 SGLang 和 LMDeploy）產生了上游貢獻，證明了 LLM 驅動的核心優化可以從受控評估轉移到實際部署。
2603.28342.author: He Du et.al.
2603.28342.authors: He Du, Qiming Ge, Jiakai Hu, Aijun Yang, Zheng Cai, Zixian Huang, Sheng Yuan, Qinxiu Cheng, Xinchen Xie, Yicheng Chen, Yining Li, Jiaxing Xie, Huanan Dong, Yaguang Wu, Xiangjun Huang, Jian Yang, Hui Wang, Bowen Zhou, Bowen Li, Qipeng Guo, Kai Chen
